what: Battle-voice bark bank: the short spoken lines rendered during combat. Records are framed 05 VV WW 00 06 SS TT <text run> 00 03 00 01; every rewrite here is in place, 0x00-padded to the original run budget, with the framing bytes preserved (a stray non-zero byte in the 00-pad gap before a sub-header makes the renderer mis-parse the next sub-line as garbage). Main bank (largest).
